JUDGE WICK, BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF. PRESENT, DEFT NOT PRESENT. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT, TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD, PLTF, TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, RODOLFO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1155 HOWARD, #10, SF, CA $1,218.00 RENT, $375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,688.00, LEASE FORFEITED
